instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: New café
task.initialEmail: Hi,||A new café has opened near the park, and I’d like to try it this weekend. [1]Do you want to come with me?[/1]||[2]Would Saturday morning be a good time?[/2] I have to visit my aunt in the afternoon.||[3]What should we do after the café?[/3] The weather should be nice.||[4]Do you think we should invite Maria too?[/4]||Write soon||Lily

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Lily,||Thanks for your email. [1]Yes, I’d like to come with you because I’ve heard the new café sells really good cakes.[/1]||[2]Saturday morning isn’t a good time for me because I have football training, but I’m free at lunchtime.[/2]||[3]After the café, we could walk in the park or take some photos if the weather is sunny.[/3]||[4]I agree that we should invite Maria too. She lives near the park, so it will be easy for her to meet us there.[/4]||See you soon,||Jake
